prompt: A rigged, game-ready 3D model of a Black Widow spider. Eight legs clearly separated and parented to bones. Compact cephalothorax and large bulbous abdomen. Dark black shiny texture with a red hourglass marking on the belly. High quality topology suitable for skeletal animation. Rigged with bones for each leg (L1-L4, R1-R4) and the abdomen. Stylized but realistic proportions.
